'''''Challenge'' 46''' was a roleplaying magazine from October/November of [[1990]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Imperial Research Station 13 (article)|Imperial Research Station 13]]" and was written by [[Lester W. Smith]].
